behaviors.behavior: Expanded More-options header rounds only its TOP corners so its square bottom meets the content divider (divider no longer collides with the header's rounded corners)
behaviors.evidence: MoreOptionsDisclosure.test.tsx::'rounds only its top corners when expanded (square bottom meets the divider)' PASSED — open => rounded-t only, closed => full pill

behaviors.behavior: Every task-form field frame + the More-options bar resolve --surface-form-line, so lightening that one token lightens all task forms including plain Claude
behaviors.evidence: SimpleFields.test.tsx + MoreOptionsDisclosure.test.tsx assert border-[var(--surface-form-line; production build emits --surface-form-line:#8e847e in dist/assets/*.css (grep-confirmed), contrast 3.05:1 vs sheet / 3.65:1 vs field-fill, both >=WCAG 3:1
